productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Nba Celtics Black Caps
description: Composition Black cap made of 100% cotton with embroidered eyelets on the crown, embroidered team name and printed logo on the front crown, brand name and logo embroidered on the side crown, team logo embroidered at the back, adjustable back strap and green visor with adidas' patented 3-Stripes in white Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not tumble dry, use softeners or bleach Cool iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean Time to cheer for your favourite NBA team, the Boston Celtics, in this black cap from adidas. Pledge your allegiance to this Basketball team as you wear it to cheer during their matches, or when you're dribbling on the court yourself. Looks great and offers protection from the sun as well. Team it with your casual clothes to look sporty.
